title: Forgot password / reset flow (OTP)
description: Customer requests a password reset, receives an OTP via Mailgun, and sets a new password after OTP verification.

inScope: Request password reset by email, generate OTP, send via Mailgun
Verify OTP and allow setting a new password
Invalidate OTP after use or expiry

acceptanceCriteria.text: Customer can request a reset OTP for a registered email
A valid, unexpired OTP allows setting a new password
An expired or already-used OTP is rejected
